## Overview

GOV.UK Notify is the UK Government's cross-government notification platform, operated by the Government Digital Service (GDS). It provides email, SMS, and letter sending via REST API with template-based personalisation, delivery status tracking, and batch operations. It is free for central government email and provides 250,000 free SMS per year.

## Products & Services

| Product | Category | Relevance to Project |
|---------|----------|---------------------|
| Email API | Notifications | Compliance reminders, submission confirmations, enforcement notices |
| SMS API | Notifications | Urgent compliance alerts, account verification |
| Letter API | Notifications | Formal enforcement correspondence (if required) |
| Template Management | Content | Personalised message templates with variable substitution |
| Delivery Tracking | Monitoring | Webhook callbacks for delivery status |

## Pricing Model

- Email: Free (unlimited volume, no setup or monthly fees)
- SMS: 2.33p per message (+ VAT); 250,000 free texts/year for central government
- Letters: From 36p per letter (+ VAT)
- No procurement cost, no setup fee, no contract

## UK Government Presence

- G-Cloud listed: N/A (free government platform, no procurement required)
- DOS listed: N/A
- UK data centres: Yes (UK sovereign infrastructure)
- Operated by: Government Digital Service (GDS)
- Mandatory under: TCoP Point 8 (Share, reuse and collaborate)

## Compliance

| Standard | Status |
|----------|--------|
| UK GDPR | Compliant |
| UK data residency | Yes (UK sovereign) |
| Accessibility | WCAG 2.2 AA compliant |
| GDS Service Standard | Built to standard |

## Strengths

- Free for central government email (zero marginal cost)
- Mature REST API with client libraries (Python, Java, Ruby, Node.js, .NET)
- Template-based messaging with personalisation variables
- Delivery status callbacks (webhook) for monitoring
- Batch sending for bulk compliance reminders
- Used by hundreds of government services
- UK data residency guaranteed

## Weaknesses

- Dependency on GDS platform availability (no SLA published for consuming services)
- SMS costs can grow if high-volume urgent notifications required
- Limited customisation of email styling (GOV.UK branding only)
- No push notification support (email and SMS only)

## Projects Referenced In

- UK Fuel Price Transparency Service (Project 001) -- mandatory notification platform
